result.stdout:
Description:
dotnet-inspect 0.7.4+700859c - A CLI tool for inspecting .NET libraries and NuGet packages

Usage:
dotnet-inspect [command] [options]

Options:
-v <v>             Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>  Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--offline          Disable all network access (use cached data only)
-?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
--version          Show version information

Commands:
type <args>         Discover types in a package or library (terse output)
member <args>       Inspect type members (docs on by default)
library <source>    Inspect a .NET library file
cache               Manage the dotnet-inspect cache
demo <index>        Run curated demo queries that showcase the tool
diff <args>         Compare API surfaces between package or platform versions
depends <type>      Walk dependency graphs upward (type hierarchy, library references, or package dependencies)
extensions <type>   Find extension methods for a type
find <pattern>      Search for types across packages and libraries
implements <type>   Find types implementing an interface or extending a base class
package <package>   Inspect a NuGet package
source <args>       Show SourceLink source file URLs for types in a package or library
skill               Show skill definition
completion <shell>  Generate shell completion script

commands.payload:
Description:
dotnet-inspect 0.7.4+700859c - A CLI tool for inspecting .NET libraries and NuGet packages

Usage:
dotnet-inspect [command] [options]

Options:
-v <v>             Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>  Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--offline          Disable all network access (use cached data only)
-?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
--version          Show version information

Commands:
type <args>         Discover types in a package or library (terse output)
member <args>       Inspect type members (docs on by default)
library <source>    Inspect a .NET library file
cache               Manage the dotnet-inspect cache
demo <index>        Run curated demo queries that showcase the tool
diff <args>         Compare API surfaces between package or platform versions
depends <type>      Walk dependency graphs upward (type hierarchy, library references, or package dependencies)
extensions <type>   Find extension methods for a type
find <pattern>      Search for types across packages and libraries
implements <type>   Find types implementing an interface or extending a base class
package <package>   Inspect a NuGet package
source <args>       Show SourceLink source file URLs for types in a package or library
skill               Show skill definition
completion <shell>  Generate shell completion script

result.stdout:
Description:
Manage the dotnet-inspect cache

Usage:
dotnet-inspect cache [command] [options]

Options:
--verbose          Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>             Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>  Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info             Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>     Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>      Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)

Commands:
clear  Clear the cache

result.stdout:
Description:
Run curated demo queries that showcase the tool

Usage:
dotnet-inspect demo [<index>] [command] [options]

Arguments:
<index>  Demo index to run (from 'demo list')

Options:
--feeling-lucky  Pick a random demo and run it
-n, --head <n>   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)

Commands:
list  List all available demos

Description:

Usage:

result.stdout:
Description:
Walk dependency graphs upward (type hierarchy, library references, or package dependencies)

Usage:
dotnet-inspect depends [<type>] [options]

Arguments:
<type>  Type name to walk dependencies for (e.g., IFloatingPointIeee754, Int128)

Options:
--package <package>          Search in package(s) (name or name@version). Can repeat.
--library <library>          Search in library file(s). Can repeat.
--platform                   Search all platform frameworks (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard)
--extensions                 Search curated Microsoft.Extensions.* packages
--aspnetcore                 Search curated Microsoft.AspNetCore.* packages
--tfm <tfm>                  Target framework (e.g., net8.0)
--json                       Output as JSON
--compact                    Minified JSON (use with --json)
--mermaid                    Output as mermaid diagram (standalone or with --markdown for embedded)
--markdown                   Output as markdown
--verbose                    Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                       Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>            Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                       Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>               Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>            NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>    NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>  Path to nuget.config file

result.stdout:
Description:
Compare API surfaces between package or platform versions

Usage:
dotnet-inspect diff [<args>...] [options]

Arguments:
<args>  Version range and type filter. When no --package/--platform is given, first arg is the package version range.

Options:
--package <package>              Package with version range (e.g., System.Text.Json@9.0.0..10.0.2)
--platform <platform>            Platform library with version range (e.g., System.Text.Json@8.0.23..10.0.2)
--framework <framework>          Framework for platform diff (runtime, aspnetcore). Default: runtime
--tfm <tfm>                      Target framework (e.g., net8.0)
--all                            Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members
-t, --type <t>                   Filter to specific type(s)
--oneline                        One result per line, columnar output
--nh, --no-header                Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
--name-only                      Show only type names that changed
--breaking                       Show only breaking changes
--additive                       Show only additive changes
--legend                         Show legend explaining change symbols
--verbose                        Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                           Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                           Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                    Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>                NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>        NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>      Path to nuget.config file
-S, -s, --select, --section <S>  Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)

commands.payload:
Description:
Compare API surfaces between package or platform versions

Usage:
dotnet-inspect diff [<args>...] [options]

Arguments:
<args>  Version range and type filter. When no --package/--platform is given, first arg is the package version range.

Options:
--package <package>              Package with version range (e.g., System.Text.Json@9.0.0..10.0.2)
--platform <platform>            Platform library with version range (e.g., System.Text.Json@8.0.23..10.0.2)
--framework <framework>          Framework for platform diff (runtime, aspnetcore). Default: runtime
--tfm <tfm>                      Target framework (e.g., net8.0)
--all                            Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members
-t, --type <t>                   Filter to specific type(s)
--oneline                        One result per line, columnar output
--nh, --no-header                Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
--name-only                      Show only type names that changed
--breaking                       Show only breaking changes
--additive                       Show only additive changes
--legend                         Show legend explaining change symbols
--verbose                        Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                           Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                           Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                    Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>                NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>        NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>      Path to nuget.config file
-S, -s, --select, --section <S>  Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)

result.stdout:
Description:
Find extension methods for a type

Usage:
dotnet-inspect extensions [<type>] [options]

Arguments:
<type>  Target type to find extensions for (e.g., HttpClient, IEnumerable<T>)

Options:
--package <package>                Search in package(s) (name or name@version). Can repeat.
--library <library>                Search in library file(s). Can repeat.
--platform                         Search all platform frameworks (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard)
--extensions                       Search curated Microsoft.Extensions.* packages
--aspnetcore                       Search curated Microsoft.AspNetCore.* packages
--reachable                        Include extensions on types reachable via properties/methods
--depth <depth>                    Max depth for reachable type traversal (default: 2)
--tfm <tfm>                        Target framework (e.g., net8.0)
--all                              Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members
-t, --type <t>                     Limit type count (-t 5) or filter by glob (-t *Json*)
--json                             Output as JSON
--compact                          Minified JSON (use with --json)
--package-prefix <package-prefix>  Search all packages matching a NuGet ID prefix (e.g., Azure.AI, AWSSDK)
--verbose                          Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                             Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                  Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                             Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                     Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                      Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>                  NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>          NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>        Path to nuget.config file

result.stdout:
Description:
Search for types across packages and libraries

Usage:
dotnet-inspect find [<pattern>] [options]

Arguments:
<pattern>  Type name or glob pattern. Comma-separated for multiple (e.g., "Option*,Argument*,Command*")

Options:
--package <package>                Search in package(s) (name or name@version). Can repeat.
--library <library>                Search in library file(s). Can repeat.
--platform                         Search all platform frameworks (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard)
--extensions                       Search curated Microsoft.Extensions.* packages
--aspnetcore                       Search curated Microsoft.AspNetCore.* packages
--project <project>                Search project dependencies via project.assets.json. Can repeat.
--bin <bin>                        Search all DLLs in output directory(s). Can repeat.
--tfm <tfm>                        Select library or target framework by TFM (e.g., net8.0)
--all                              Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete types
-t, --type <t>                     Limit type count (-t 5) or filter by glob (-t *Json*)
--json                             Output as JSON
--compact                          Minified JSON (use with --json)
--oneline                          One result per line, columnar output
--nh, --no-header                  Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
--package-prefix <package-prefix>  Search all packages matching a NuGet ID prefix (e.g., Azure.AI, AWSSDK)
--columns <columns>                Filter columns by name (comma-separated)
--fields <fields>                  Filter fields by name (comma-separated)
--verbose                          Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                             Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                  Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                             Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                     Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                      Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>                  NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>          NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>        Path to nuget.config file

result.stdout:
Description:
Inspect a .NET library file

Usage:
dotnet-inspect library [<source>] [options]

Arguments:
<source>  Library file path, NuGet package name (e.g., System.Text.Json), or package@version

Options:
--references                             Show library references
--dependencies                           Show library dependencies as a tree (tip: use 'depends --library' instead)
--platform <platform>                    Inspect platform library (e.g., System.Text.Json)
--package <package>                      Inspect library from NuGet package (e.g., System.Text.Json or System.Text.Json@9.0.4)
--framework <framework>                  Platform framework (runtime, aspnetcore). Use @version for specific version
--tfm <tfm>                              Select library by TFM (e.g., net8.0, or 'all' for every TFM)
--extract-resources <extract-resources>  Extract embedded resources to a directory
--nh, --no-header                        Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
--json                                   Output as JSON
--markdown                               Output as markdown
--plaintext                              Output as plain text
--mermaid                                Output as mermaid diagram (standalone or with --markdown for embedded)
--verbose                                Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                                   Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                        Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                                   Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                           Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                            Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
-D, --discover <D>                       Discover schema: sections, or items within a section
-S, -s, --select, --section <S>          Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)
--columns <columns>                      Filter columns by name (comma-separated)
--fields <fields>                        Filter fields by name (comma-separated)
--effective                              Show sections with data (runs full pipeline)
--tree                                   Show discovery as a tree (sections → items)
--source <source>                        NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>                NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>              Path to nuget.config file

-T, --tips <tips>                        Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                                   Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr

--tail <tail>                            Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)

--fields <fields>                        Filter fields by name (comma-separated)
--effective                              Show sections with data (runs full pipeline)
--tree                                   Show discovery as a tree (sections → items)
--source <source>                        NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>                NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>              Path to nuget.config file

result.stdout:
Description:
Inspect type members (docs on by default)

Usage:
dotnet-inspect member [<args>...] [options]

Arguments:
<args>  Package, type name, and member filter. When no --package/--library/--platform is given, first arg is the package.

Options:
--package <package>              Source: package (file, name, or name@version)
--library <library>              Source: library path (local file, or relative within package)
--platform <platform>            Source: platform library (e.g., System.Text.Json)
--framework <framework>          Source: platform framework (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard). @version for specific
--tfm <tfm>                      Source: select by TFM (e.g., net8.0)
--all                            Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members
-m, --member <m>                 Filter members by name (supports globs, Type.Member dotted syntax)
--ctor                           Filter members to constructors (shorthand for -m .ctor)
-n, --head <n>                   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--json                           Output as JSON
--compact                        Output as minified JSON (use with --json)
--oneline                        One result per line, columnar output
--nh, --no-header                Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
--unsafe                         Filter members to unsafe signatures (pointers)
--index <index>                  Select member overload by index (or use Name:N shorthand)
--params <params>                Select member overload by parameter types (comma-separated)
-of <of>                         Select member overload by first parameter type
--show-index                     Show member overload index (Name:N) column
-k, --kind <k>                   Filter by member kind (method, property, field, event, constructor)
-D, --discover <D>               Discover schema: sections, or items within a section
-S, -s, --select, --section <S>  Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)
--columns <columns>              Filter columns by name (comma-separated)
--fields <fields>                Filter fields by name (comma-separated)
--effective                      Show sections with data (runs full pipeline)
--tree                           Show discovery as a tree (sections → items)
--markdown                       Output as markdown
--plaintext                      Output as plain text
--verbose                        Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                           Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                           Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                    Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>                NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>        NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>      Path to nuget.config file

result.stdout:
Description:
Inspect a NuGet package

Usage:
dotnet-inspect package [<package>...] [command] [options]

Arguments:
<package>  NuGet package name or path to .nupkg file, optionally with version (e.g., System.Text.Json@9.0.0)

Options:
--dependencies                   Show transitive package dependency tree (tip: use 'depends --package' instead)
--tree, --layout                 Show package file tree
--files                          List files in the package (flat list, filterable with --tfm)
--tfms                           List target frameworks in the package
--lib                            Scope to lib/ folder (use with --files or --layout)
--tools                          Scope to tools/ folder (use with --files or --layout)
--versions <versions>            List available versions (optionally limit count)
--preview, --prerelease          With --versions: include prerelease versions
--readme                         Show the README.md content from the package
--tfm <tfm>                      Select library by TFM (e.g., net8.0)
--version <version>              Package version (or use alone to show resolved version)
--latest-version                 Show latest version from nuget.org
--out <out>                      Write output to file instead of stdout
--oneline                        One result per line, columnar output
--nh, --no-header                Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
--json                           Output as JSON
--markdown                       Output as markdown
--plaintext                      Output as plain text
--verbose                        Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                           Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                           Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                    Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
-D, --discover <D>               Discover schema: sections, or items within a section
-S, -s, --select, --section <S>  Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)
--columns <columns>              Filter columns by name (comma-separated)
--fields <fields>                Filter fields by name (comma-separated)
--effective                      Show sections with data (runs full pipeline)
--tree                           Show discovery as a tree (sections → items)
--source <source>                NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>        NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>      Path to nuget.config file

Commands:
search <query>  Search NuGet for packages by keyword

result.stdout:
Description:
Search NuGet for packages by keyword

Usage:
dotnet-inspect package search [<query>] [options]

Arguments:
<query>  Search query (keyword or package name prefix)

Options:
--take <take>            Maximum number of results (default: 20)
--preview, --prerelease  Include prerelease versions
--json                   Output as JSON
--compact                Minified JSON (use with --json)
--verbose                Show progress messages on stderr
-n, --head <n>           Limit to first N lines (like head -n)

commands.payload:
Description:
Search NuGet for packages by keyword

Usage:
dotnet-inspect package search [<query>] [options]

Arguments:
<query>  Search query (keyword or package name prefix)

Options:
--take <take>            Maximum number of results (default: 20)
--preview, --prerelease  Include prerelease versions
--json                   Output as JSON
--compact                Minified JSON (use with --json)
--verbose                Show progress messages on stderr
-n, --head <n>           Limit to first N lines (like head -n)

result.stdout:
Description:
Show SourceLink source file URLs for types in a package or library

Usage:
dotnet-inspect source [<args>...] [options]

Arguments:
<args>  Package and optional type name. When no --package/--library/--platform is given, first arg is the package.

Options:
--package <package>              Source: package (file, name, or name@version)
--library <library>              Source: library path (local file, or relative within package)
--platform <platform>            Source: platform library (e.g., System.Text.Json)
--framework <framework>          Source: platform framework (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard). @version for specific
--tfm <tfm>                      Source: select by TFM (e.g., net8.0)
--all                            Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete types
-m, --member <m>                 Member name to resolve (e.g., Clear, TryGetValue:2 for overload)
-t, --type <t>                   Filter types by glob pattern (e.g., *Json*, Progress*)
--verify                         Verify SourceLink URLs are accessible (HTTP HEAD)
--audit                          Full source audit: verify all PDB source files are accessible
--browsable-urls                 Use /blob/ URLs for browser viewing (default: /raw/ for LLM consumption)
--cat                            Print source file contents to stdout
--json                           Output as JSON
--compact                        Output as minified JSON (use with --json)
--oneline                        One result per line, columnar output
--nh, --no-header                Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
-D, --discover <D>               Discover schema: sections, or items within a section
-S, -s, --select, --section <S>  Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)
--columns <columns>              Filter columns by name (comma-separated)
--fields <fields>                Filter fields by name (comma-separated)
--effective                      Show sections with data (runs full pipeline)
--tree                           Show discovery as a tree (sections → items)
--markdown                       Output as markdown
--plaintext                      Output as plain text
--verbose                        Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                           Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                           Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                    Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>                NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>        NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>      Path to nuget.config file

result.stdout:
Description:
Discover types in a package or library (terse output)

Usage:
dotnet-inspect type [<args>...] [options]

Arguments:
<args>  Package and type pattern. When no --package/--library/--platform is given, first arg is the package.

Options:
--package <package>              Source: package (file, name, or name@version)
--library <library>              Source: library path (local file, or relative within package)
--platform <platform>            Source: platform library (e.g., System.Text.Json)
--framework <framework>          Source: platform framework (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard). @version for specific
--tfm <tfm>                      Source: select by TFM (e.g., net8.0)
--all                            Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members
-t, --type <t>                   Filter types by glob pattern (e.g., *Json*, Progress*)
--json                           Output as JSON
--compact                        Output as minified JSON (use with --json)
--oneline                        One result per line, columnar output
--nh, --no-header                Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)
--shape                          Output type shape (inheritance, interfaces, members)
--unsafe                         Filter types with unsafe signatures (pointers)
-m, --member <m>                 Filter members by name or limit count (-m 5)
-k, --kind <k>                   Filter by kind (class, struct, interface, enum, delegate, method, property, field, event, constructor)
-D, --discover <D>               Discover schema: sections, or items within a section
-S, -s, --select, --section <S>  Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)
--columns <columns>              Filter columns by name (comma-separated)
--fields <fields>                Filter fields by name (comma-separated)
--effective                      Show sections with data (runs full pipeline)
--tree                           Show discovery as a tree (sections → items)
--markdown                       Output as markdown
--plaintext                      Output as plain text
--verbose                        Show progress messages on stderr
-v <v>                           Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)
-T, --tips <tips>                Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)
--info                           Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr
-n, --head <n>                   Limit to first N lines (like head -n)
--tail <tail>                    Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)
--source <source>                NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)
--add-source <add-source>        NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)
--nugetconfig <nugetconfig>      Path to nuget.config file
